items.title: Trip Change Self-Service discovery
items.name: Trip Change Self-Service discovery
items.summary: Planned discovery to determine how much traveler servicing can shift into self-service trip changes.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which change flows should become fully self-serve in Q3.

items.title: Homes Activation Guidance discovery
items.name: Homes Activation Guidance discovery
items.summary: Planned discovery to understand which onboarding and early-demand interventions most improve first-booking speed for hosts.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which host activation surfaces should become more guided or automated in Q3.
